examples: The reactions were carried out in an isocratic reactor and an oil bath fixed bed reactor, which are designed by us.
Diastereomers of cinchonine and cinchonidine were fully separated both under isocratic and gradient elutions on the chiral monolithic column.
Then, I use another 10-min gradient to reequilibrate from the final conditions back to the initial conditions, followed by 8 min of isocratic hold.
